database_info.name: Schneider Electric Actassi Structured Cabling Selection Theory
database_info.purpose: Engineering design tool for structured cabling, fiber, and network cabinet selection

1_cabling_category_selection.principle: Cable category must support required bandwidth and application

comparison.best_for: Standard LAN, PoE cameras, VoIP, general IT
Data centers, high-speed backbone, Wi-Fi 6/6E APs, 10G cameras

1_cabling_category_selection.recommendation: Cat6 sufficient for 95% of surveillance/PA installations. Cat6A for future-proofing, data centers, or Wi-Fi 6E access points.

2_jacket_rating_selection.principle: Cable jacket must meet fire safety requirements of installation location

ratings.use: Europe, Middle East, Asia — public buildings, tunnels, hospitals, data centers
ratings.note: Mandatory in most Middle East building codes

ratings.use: US — general horizontal runs, non-riser, non-plenum
US — air handling spaces (above ceiling plenum)

2_jacket_rating_selection.middle_east_rule: LSZH is the standard requirement in Jordan, UAE, KSA, and most Middle East building codes. Always specify LSZH for commercial/public buildings.

3_patch_cord_selection.principle: Patch cords connect equipment to patch panel and wall outlet to device

copper_patch_cords.use: Switch to patch panel, device to wall outlet
Same — blue color coding for camera/data distinction

3_patch_cord_selection.color_coding: Use White for standard data, Blue for camera/security network. Maintain consistent color scheme per TIA-606.
3_patch_cord_selection.length_guide: 0.5m: same rack. 1m: adjacent rack units. 3m: cross-connect or desk to wall plate.

4_face_plate_selection.principle: Face plate style must match electrical system and port count

styles.best_for: Standard commercial, office, visible wall outlet
When using Schneider Unica electrical switches/sockets — matching aesthetics

4_face_plate_selection.keystone_compatibility: All Actassi face plates accept standard keystone modules (VDIEB/VDIB series).

5_keystone_jack_selection.principle: Keystone jacks terminate horizontal cable at the wall outlet

models.VDIEB17266UWE: Cat6 UTP — standard, tool-less termination, single unit
models.VDIB17366UWE: Cat6 UTP — variant B, single unit
models.VDIB17726U12: Cat6 UTP — 12-pack (for patch panels or bulk projects)

5_keystone_jack_selection.termination: T568A or T568B color code. Tool-less snap-in or 110-style punch-down. Must pass Cat6 channel test after termination.

6_patch_panel_selection.principle: Patch panel provides structured termination point in 19" rack

models.use: Premium — sliding design for easier access

6_patch_panel_selection.sizing: 1 patch panel (24 ports) per 24 cable runs. Label every port per TIA-606.

7_network_cabinet_selection.principle: Cabinet size must accommodate all equipment with space for growth

wall_mount_cabinets.use: Larger IDF, multiple switches and equipment

open_rack.use: Server room, open access for cooling

floor_standing.use: MDF/server room, full-depth servers, large switch stacks
floor_standing.features: Glass front door, perforated rear, 800kg load, casters

7_network_cabinet_selection.sizing_guide: Equipment U-height + 30% spare + 1U cable management per 2U equipment = total U needed.

8_fiber_optic_selection.principle: Fiber type must match distance and bandwidth requirements

fiber_types.use: Within building, data center, short backbone
Between buildings, campus backbone, long distance

connector_types.LC: Small form factor — most common for modern switches/SFP

8_fiber_optic_selection.rule: OM3 for intra-building (<300m). OS2 for inter-building or >300m. Always use LC connectors for new installations.

9_rj45_field_connector.principle: Field-terminated RJ45 connectors for direct equipment connection

models.ACTRJ1UCMPSC: Cat6 RJ45 field connector (compact — for tight spaces)

9_rj45_field_connector.use_case: Terminate cable directly to RJ45 plug without wall plate. Used for camera tails, temporary connections, equipment pigtails.
9_rj45_field_connector.note: Field connectors are slightly less reliable than keystone jack termination. Use keystone + patch cord where possible.

10_compliance_and_warranty.principle: Schneider Actassi system provides certified end-to-end performance

standards.scope: Copper cabling component and channel performance

10_compliance_and_warranty.warranty: Schneider Actassi system offers up to 25-year system warranty when installed by certified installer using all Actassi components. Includes channel performance guarantee.
10_compliance_and_warranty.certification: Third-party tested and certified by independent laboratories. Annual recertification.
